summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Autonomous Ecosystem Architect's new patrol features including interactive map visualization, real-time WebSocket updates, and patrol completion reports with biodiversity data

flaky_endpoints.workaround: AI analysis fails but doesn't break core functionality

design_issues.issue: Patrols tab not found in map filter tabs
Legend not found with expected selector

passed_tests: POST /api/patrols/{id}/complete - Completes patrol and generates report (✅)
Live Map page displays zones, drones, and patrol routes (✅)
Map has stats overlay with drone/zone counts (✅)
Patrol Routes page has Schedules and Reports tabs (✅)
Complete button on active patrols generates report (✅)
Reports tab shows biodiversity data collected (✅)
Patrol waypoints and AI reasoning display (✅)
Interactive Leaflet map with zones and drones (✅)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable configuration for AI analysis functionality. Consider adding Patrols tab to map filters and improving legend visibility.
